sub_modules.fft16_addr_gen: Combinational radix-2 DIT stage address generator for one butterfly per cycle. Produces p/q memory addresses and the twiddle index for N=16.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM using the exact required N=16 cosine and positive-sine table.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly. Reuses one unit iteratively and supports FFT/IFFT twiddle sign selection.
sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse: Combinational 4-bit address bit-reversal block used during input loading so DIT computation produces natural-order FFT bins.
sub_modules.fft16_output_scale: Combinational output normalization block. Passes FFT outputs unchanged and divides IFFT outputs by N=16 via arithmetic right shift.
